---
title: "Welcome"
---
I'm a senior research analyst at ECOnorthwest in Portland, Oregon. I worked as a musician for over a decade before returning to school during the pandemic years to study geospatial information science and pivoting into my current work. My interests include reading, American football, and coding in R.

## Featured work

- [Maps & data visualization](projects.qmd)
- [Skookum Sound](https://martymarquis.bandcamp.com)

## Contact or next steps

- [ECOnorthwest](https://econw.com)
- [City of Scappoose](https://www.scappoose.gov)
- [Blitzen Trapper via archive.org](https://archive.org/details/BlitzenTrapper)
